raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kas zaur to Wahrdu tohe
Zitwekus darra grehkoht/ un leet
tam Walgus/ kas tohs Wahr-
tis pahrmabza/ un kas to Taif-
nu iṡdsenn Tuksnefi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz fakka tas
KUNgs/ kas Ahbrȧȧmu irr at-
pestijs us Jehkabu ta: Jehkabe
ne tape waifs Kauna/ unwinna
Waigs ne nobahlehs wairs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo kad wiṡsch sawus
Behrnuus manno Johko Darbu
fawa Starpȧ redsehs/ tad fiveh-
tihs tee mannu Wahrdu / un
fwehtihs to Swehtu eeksh Jeh-
kaba/ un bihfees to Israėta
Deewu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee/ kam allejams
Gors irr/ atsihs to Saprascha-
nu/ un tee Plukfchketajt usjems
to Mahztbu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXX. Vodalla.
Sluddinaschana preet teem Judecmi 1. Ta-
pehz kad tee ue irr us Deewu bet us Egip-
ti patahwuschees : 2. Buhs teem ka Poh-
dam fadausiteem tapt 13. Bet teem/ kas
us to KUNGll palaischabs/ buhs usturre.
teem un fwehtiteem tapt: 18. Bet teem
Afirereem buhs pehdigi zaur Deewa bahrs-
gu Tuismibu isbeldeteem tapt: 7.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Aj teem atkahpajeem
Behrneem ! fakka tas
KUNGS: Kas Pa-
dehtmus nem/ bet ne zaur man-
ni / ua Patwerumu * mekle /
bet ne zaur mannu Garru / un
pulzina weenu Grehku pahr
ohtru.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "* Eebr: Wall: Ar Apfegschanu apfedlahs.
2. Kas ect un nostatga us E-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "giptes-Semmi/un mannu Mut-
ti ne waiza/ un stiprinajhs ar
Warais Spehka/ un jettim fa-
wu Patwerumu appafsch Egip-
tes Ehnas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo Warais Spehks is-
dohfees jums par Kaunu/un tas
Patwerums appafsch Egiptes
Ehnas par Apfineekli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo winna Wirfneeki gan
irr Joana bijufchi / un winna
Wehstneschi lihos Anefai nah-
kutch.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "(Tomehr) winsch darrihs
tohs wins us Kauna zaur teem
Laudim/ kas winxeem Leeti ne
derrehs/ nedś par Paligu/ nedś
par zittu Labbumu/ bet par Kau-
nu ween un par Apfineekli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "(Schier) ta Nasta pahr
teem Lohpeem / (kas eet) pretē
Deenas-Widdu/ tai Behdu ux
Isbailes Semmė/ kur tee stipri
Lanwas/ un wezzi Lanwas irr/
Nhdsės un deggoschi stretjamt
Puhki. Sawu Mantu weddihs
tee Kumetu Muggurȧ/ un fawir
Padohmu us Kameetu Kupreem/
us teem Laudim/ kas Leeti ne
derrehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo Egiptes-Semme tre
nekretiga / un winnas Paligs
buhs var welti. Tapehz ejmir
es pahr to fluddinajs / Rakaba
tehdehs ar Meeru.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad eij/ rakstt preeksch
winneem us Galdu/ un aprak-
sti to Brahmatȧ / ka tas paleek
lihds vastarat Deenat nuhschigt
mubscham.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
